channel.title: Casa Caravan — Sound
channel.description: Sound healing sessions, gong recordings, handpan music and sonic journey notes by Tağmaç Çankaya.

item.title: Sonic Journey — 45-Minute Immersive Sound Session
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: A 45-minute immersive sound session with hand-forged gongs and handpan. Not merely a listening event — the vibrations move through the body, not just the ears. Brainwaves shift from Beta to Alpha and Theta. Nine five-star reviews. Wednesdays in Lefkoşa. €75 individual, €37.50 duo per person, €60 online. WhatsApp: +90 533 880 0870

item.title: Music by Tağmaç Çankaya — 12 Recordings Available
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: 12 recordings available: And You, Fox Tail, Half, I Don't Know, I Know, Keeping It Together (handpan), Late Afternoon (synth impro), Monkey & Gong, Purnima, Synth Impro., Trot, Vocal & Shruti. €1 each. Digital download.
